articles.title: How bettors won backing Antonelli to win in Japan
articles.summary: How bettors won backing Antonelli to win in Japan. The Mercedes star was favourite to win from the start, but clever in-play bettors secured a much bigger win.

articles.title: 5 betting lessons learnt after Kimi wins in Japan
articles.summary: 5 betting lessons learnt after Kimi wins in Japan. A stunning win for Kimi Antonelli in Suzuka means the Italian teenager now leads the Drivers’ Championship standings.

articles.title: All the key moments from the 2026 Japanese Grand Prix
articles.summary: All the key moments from the 2026 Japanese Grand Prix. During an eventful weekend at Suzuka, Kimi Antonelli picked up a second consecutive victory – which also earned him a historic championship lead.

articles.title: Wolff praises Antonelli despite ‘botched’ Japan start
articles.summary: Wolff praises Antonelli despite ‘botched’ Japan start. Toto Wolff has praised Kimi Antonelli’s continued trajectory following the youngster’s second consecutive victory in Japan, though the Mercedes boss also acknowledged that the team need to work on their starts following a “botched” launch for th...

articles.title: Watch Round 3 of the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship
articles.summary: Watch Round 3 of the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship. The third round of the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship gets underway on Sunday with drivers set to race at the Bahrain International Circuit.

articles.title: Catch Qualifying from Round 3 of the F1 Sim Racing World Championship
articles.summary: Catch Qualifying from Round 3 of the F1 Sim Racing World Championship. A busy three-day event at the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship reaches its conclusion today as the sim racers ready themselves for Round 3, the Bahrain Grand Prix.

articles.title: What the teams said – Race day in Japan
articles.summary: What the teams said – Race day in Japan. The drivers and teams report back on all the action from at Suzuka for the of the 2026 Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Verstappen admits Red Bull are in the ‘midfield battle’
articles.summary: Verstappen admits Red Bull are in the ‘midfield battle’. Max Verstappen was limited to P8 in the Japanese Grand Prix following further struggles with his Red Bull car.

articles.title: Leclerc laments Safety Car timing after P3 finish in Japan
articles.summary: Leclerc laments Safety Car timing after P3 finish in Japan. Charles Leclerc believes "we got a little unlucky" during the Japanese Grand Prix due to an ill-timed Safety Car, with the Ferrari driver salvaging third place.

articles.title: Norris motivated by ‘good signs’ from Japan top-five finish
articles.summary: Norris motivated by ‘good signs’ from Japan top-five finish. McLaren enjoyed their highest scoring round of the season as Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris finished second and fifth respectively in Japan.

articles.title: ‘We do all right when we get to start’ but Piastri rues safety car that cost him shot at win in Japan
articles.summary: ‘We do all right when we get to start’ but Piastri rues safety car that cost him shot at win in Japan. Oscar Piastri finally got a race under his belt in Japan, but could it have been a win if a safety car hadn't intervened?

articles.title: Antonelli not thinking of title challenge yet, but wants to keep 'raising the bar'
articles.summary: Antonelli not thinking of title challenge yet, but wants to keep 'raising the bar'. Kimi Antonelli says it's too early to be thinking about the title, despite back-to-back grand prix wins, but knows what he needs to do if he's to mount a sustained title challenge.

articles.title: Drivers warned F1 and FIA about Bearman-style crash - Sainz
articles.summary: Drivers warned F1 and FIA about Bearman-style crash - Sainz. Carlos Sainz wants the FIA to take action to prevent similar crashes to the one Oliver Bearman suffered at the Japanese Grand Prix, saying driver already warned it was going to happen.

articles.title: Bearman avoids fractures in 50G crash at Suzuka
articles.summary: Bearman avoids fractures in 50G crash at Suzuka. Oliver Bearman escaped serious injury after a huge crash in the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli becomes F1’s youngest championship leader with Japanese GP win
articles.summary: Antonelli becomes F1’s youngest championship leader with Japanese GP win. Kimi Antonelli made the most of a safety car to recover from a poor start and win at Suzuka, becoming the youngest person ever to lead the F1 drivers' championship.

articles.title: Mercedes set for toughest challenge of the season so far in Japan
articles.summary: Mercedes set for toughest challenge of the season so far in Japan. Mercedes has been untouchable so far this season, but in Japan, it looks set to face challenges on multiple fronts.

articles.title: ‘Nice to be closer’ to Mercedes after Japanese GP qualifying P3 - Piastri
articles.summary: ‘Nice to be closer’ to Mercedes after Japanese GP qualifying P3 - Piastri. Oscar Piastri was happy to be nearer to Mercedes in qualifying for the Japanese Grand Prix, but says McLaren still needs to find pace and grip.

articles.title: Verstappen beyond frustrated as 2026 woes continue in Japan
articles.summary: Verstappen beyond frustrated as 2026 woes continue in Japan. Max Verstappen said “I'm not even frustrated anymore, I'm beyond that,” as his discontent with Formula 1 this season continued with a tricky qualifying for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Ferrari drivers struggle with deployment issues in final part of Suzuka qualifying
articles.summary: Ferrari drivers struggle with deployment issues in final part of Suzuka qualifying. Ferrari's Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton were held back by their engine's energy deployment in the final part of qualifying for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli leads Mercedes front-row lockout in Japan
articles.summary: Antonelli leads Mercedes front-row lockout in Japan. Kimi Antonelli secured his second consecutive pole position as Mercedes was untouchable in qualifying for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: What can F1's bosses do to help keep Verstappen in the sport?
articles.summary: What can F1's bosses do to help keep Verstappen in the sport?. F1 finds itself in something of a tangled web as it tries to refine the new rules, improve safety and ensure the drivers are happy without compromising racing.

articles.title: 'Is it worth it?' - Verstappen considering F1 future
articles.summary: 'Is it worth it?' - Verstappen considering F1 future. Four-time F1 world champion Max Verstappen tells BBC Sport he is "not enjoying" the sport after changes to the rules this season.

articles.title: Piastri impresses, Gasly excels - Japanese GP driver ratings
articles.summary: Piastri impresses, Gasly excels - Japanese GP driver ratings. BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli wins to become youngest title leader
articles.summary: Antonelli wins to become youngest title leader. Kimi Antonelli takes his second win in succession and the lead of the world championship at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Maybe Verstappen needs a break from F1? - Hill
articles.summary: Maybe Verstappen needs a break from F1? - Hill. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, 1996 F1 world champion Damon Hill thinks that if Max Verstappen is not enjoying the sport any more following regulation changes then perhaps he needs to take a break.

articles.title: F1: Chequered Flag
articles.summary: F1: Chequered Flag. The team react to the Japanese GP and Max Verstappen’s comments on his future.

articles.title: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions
articles.summary: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions. Our F1 correspondent Andrew Benson is doing a weekly Q&A this season, so get your questions in now.

articles.title: 'Antonelli had the luck, but sometimes you need it'
articles.summary: 'Antonelli had the luck, but sometimes you need it'. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, Harry Benjamin, Alice Powell and Bec Clancy discuss how Kimi Antonelli benefitted from a slice of luck to take the win in Japan and feel that Mercedes will be ruing the extended break from racin...

articles.title: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson
articles.summary: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson. On the latest episode of the The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird say Kimi Antonelli's Chinese Grand Prix win at 19 years old "is as big as it comes" for a young driver, after the Italian was moved to tears following his win.

articles.title: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP
articles.summary: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag podcast, Sam Bird believes Lewis Hamilton's spark "is back" again after the British driver finished in third at the Chinese Grand Prix.
